{{CargoRelic
|name=Werewolf Serum
|class_id=20834
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Extracted serum from a werewolf-infected patient, laden with potent lycanthropy toxin, it is said that a single drop can infect dozens of healthy adults!
|fame=15
|art=14
|fth=17
|civ=13
|tech=31
|ss1=Snail HP +100<br>Per 5k DNA Strength, Snail ATK +5<br>DNA Strength: 50000/50000
|ss2=Snail HP +200<br>Per 5k DNA Strength, Snail ATK +10<br>DNA Strength: 50000/50000
|ss3=Snail HP +300<br>Per 5k DNA Strength, Snail ATK +15<br>DNA Strength: 50000/50000
|ss4=Snail HP +300<br>Per 5k DNA Strength, Snail ATK +15<br>DNA Strength: 50000/50000
|ss7=Snail HP +300<br>Per 5k DNA Strength, Snail ATK +15<br>DNA Strength: 50000/50000<br> (Awakened)
}}
